title: stelis cotyligera
intro: Stelis cotyligera, also known as the red bell orchid, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis cotyligera include its potential to treat various ailments such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
